sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n81827" key="periourgo/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">περιουργός</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, in pl., <sense id="n81827.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">meddlers</tr_>, contemptuously of the <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">θεουργοί</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0096.tlg002:11" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11</biblScope></bibl></cit>, Aug.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Civ.D.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10.16</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
